message:
fix(export-html): accurate message counts + legible code blocks without CDNs

Two p1 bugs fixed:

1. Message count now shows "46 turns, 971 tool calls" instead of the
   misleading "1255 messages". Human turns are user-role messages
   without tool_call data. Tool calls are messages with tool_call data.
   Both the HTML header and the console output now show the breakdown.

   Files: lib.rs (counting logic), template.rs (TemplateMetadata struct
   + render_header display)

2. Code blocks with --no-cdns are now legible. The root cause was that
   the .no-prism CSS fallback class was only added by Prism CDN onerror
   handlers, which never fire when CDN tags are omitted. Now the <html>
   tag gets class="no-prism no-tailwind" when !include_cdn. The fallback
   CSS was also broadened from code[class*="language-"] to all pre code
   elements, since not all code blocks have language classes.

   Files: template.rs (html_classes conditional, CDN_FALLBACK_CSS)

Closes: coding_agent_session_search-1hpvy (message count)
Closes: coding_agent_session_search-zy9l5 (code block visibility)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
